criteria_direction_values._comment: DuProcess `direction` radio in criteria_array: '' = Both/All (default), 'F' = From party (Grantor), 'T' = To party (Grantee).

_deed_instrument_type_id_note: Resolve the literal DEED type id from Lookup/InstrumentTypeLookup on first live run; criteria_array.inst_type takes a comma-joined single-quoted id list, e.g. "'DEED'".

criteria_array_fields._comment: Field set the adapter emits inside the single-element criteria_array JSON. Empty strings are sent for unused fields.

result_columns._comment: igGrid DefaultColumnList keys → DocumentRecord mapping (verified from SPA bundle index.6bae0200.js, capture 2026-02-11).

selectors._comment: DuProcess is a JSON SPA, not HTML-grid — selectors are N/A. Result parsing is JSON-keyed (see result_columns).

notes: Seminole County FL — DuProcess Web Inquiry (recording.seminoleclerk.org/DuProcessWebInquiry/). Vue3 SPA + ASP.NET MVC JSON backend (Infragistics igGrid). Pure-HTTP, GET-based JSON API; NO Cloudflare/reCAPTCHA/disclaimer; anonymous search allowed (user_id=''). Adapter: duprocess_http_adapter.py (Wave-1 build 2026-06-10). API contract reverse-engineered from the live SPA bundle via Wayback (the live host geo-blocks the non-US build env — see case folder phase0_probe_recorder.md). Flow: GET app root -> GET Home/GetVerifiedUntilDate (County Effective Date) -> GET Home/CriteriaSearch?criteria_array=<json>&user_id= for name/parcel search -> Home/LoadInstrument (access_key=obfuscate(gin)+'!'+ipsum+'-'+min+'-'+sec) for detail -> Home/GetRelatedInstruments (satisfaction<->mortgage chain) -> Home/CreateDocument / Home/GetDocumentPage for image. Direct retrieval via Integration/QueryInstrumentID (book/page/inst#). Deed-first: set criteria_array.inst_type to the DEED type id from Lookup/InstrumentTypeLookup, then re-search by criteria_array.parcel_id off the vesting deed's real_estate_id. Run BOTH PORTILLA names. WAVE-2 must run live from US egress + confirm CriteriaSearch JSON envelope shape (bare array vs {d:[]}) and result-cap behavior. Test subject: PORTILLA Mark J + Angela M, 3136 Splendid Stowe Lane, Longwood FL 32779.
